chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D305 of 2021: Muhammad Yousuf Jakhrani vs. P.O. Sindh &others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Zafar Ali Malghani, Advocate Dates of hearing: 09.03.2022 Date of announcement: 09.03.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Granted subject to all just exceptions. (1&3) The petitioner claims to have been engaged in 2012 on probation and seeks release of purported salaries from the date of such alleged appointment, however,has filed this petition in 2021. On the first date of hearing, being 23.09.2021, learned counsel was confronted with respect to the issue of laches and he was unable to provide any satisfactory justification. Same is the case today. This petition is found to be hit by lachesand is hereby dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
